title: Gerrare household
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Gerrare household''' was a simple single-story white dwelling owned by [[Shayne Gerrare]]. It was located on the west side of [[Gadrin]], with only a hundred meters of grass separating the rear of the house from the [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]] jungles. Small animals would occasionally come out from the jungle to graze on the lawn.

The home was an understated building with a very expensive security system. Part of the security system was a booby-trap that, when set, would discharge a powerful electric shock if three people stood in the central hallway. The home had two rooms on either side of the hallway—a bedroom, a kitchen, a study, and a comm center.

A battle was fought on the household's front lawn between members of the [[Cularin resistance]] and the [[Metatheran Cartel]], which was trying to capture Gerrare. This left scorch marks on the front door.

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Eye of the Sun: The Resistance Within}}
